subject: A blue-skinned Vedalken mechanic-saboteur in racing gear, wearing goggles and a high-tech harness, gripping a large wrench-like tool
description: A Vedalken figure rendered in deep cyan-blue tones occupies the foreground, leaning forward in an aggressive working stance. The figure wears yellow-tinted goggles strapped over a bald head, with a metallic harness and racing/mechanic's rig across the torso. The hands grip a heavy wrench or saboteur's tool, suggesting active interference with race machinery. Background is hazy with cool blue light and indistinct industrial shapes — the dust and motion of a racing environment. The composition is mid-shot, focused on the figure's purposeful forward motion, emphasizing technical menace rather than overt violence.
foreground: Vedalken mechanic-saboteur in goggles and harness, gripping a tool
background: hazy industrial racing environment, blue mist and motion blur
